service_name: Information Security Strategy and Planning Services
description: Evaluates whether the organization has a coherent information security strategy aligned to business risk, with actionable planning, governance, and measurable outcomes.

capabilities.name: Security strategy alignment with business objectives
capabilities.description: Information security strategy is explicitly linked to business goals, risk appetite, and enterprise planning cycles.
evaluation_focus: Refresh cadence tied to business planning

capabilities.name: Governance and accountability model
capabilities.description: Roles, committees, and decision rights for security strategy are defined and operating.

capabilities.name: Enterprise risk management integration
capabilities.description: Cyber and information security risks are integrated into enterprise risk registers and treatment planning.

capabilities.name: Multi-year security roadmap
capabilities.description: A prioritized roadmap connects strategy to initiatives, dependencies, and timelines.

capabilities.name: Policy and standards framework
capabilities.description: Policies and standards translate strategy into enforceable requirements across the organization.

capabilities.name: Budget and resource planning
capabilities.description: Security funding, staffing, and capability investments are planned and tracked against strategy.

capabilities.name: Metrics, KPIs, and reporting
capabilities.description: Security performance is measured and reported to leadership with actionable insights.

capabilities.name: Regulatory and compliance alignment
capabilities.description: Strategy and planning account for applicable regulations, contracts, and assurance obligations.

capabilities.name: Third-party and supply chain security strategy
capabilities.description: Third-party risk is addressed in strategy with consistent requirements and oversight.

capabilities.name: Workforce and security culture planning
capabilities.description: Awareness, training, and culture initiatives are planned to support strategic outcomes.
